full_text:
Li Hu ÊùéËôé
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Hu (ÊùéËôé). Gave Deng Ai documents pertaining to the resources of Shu and arranged the ceremony of the state formal surrender. Li Hu was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom and the Wei Kingdom.
